title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine as the company enters its next growth phase. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Finout is a cloud cost management company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, backed by over $85M in funding.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Head of RevOps role at perfect seniority level, B2B SaaS fintech domain expertise, 15+ years exceed 7+ requirement, scale experience aligns with $30M+ ARR mandate, and Salesforce/analytics skills are core strengths. Location is ideal with Tel Aviv HQ and remote-friendly setup.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's expansion into the New York market and was impressed by the fintech/cloud cost management angle—it's exactly the kind of B2B SaaS complexity where revenue operations becomes a strategic lever, not just admin. With your track record scaling RevOps engines through high-growth phases and deep Salesforce expertise, the Head of Revenue Operations role reporting to the CRO seems tailor-made for what you've built before.

title: Manager, Revenue Operations
description: An operator role focused on building and optimizing Embrace's Salesforce and RevOps stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, LeanData, Apollo, Clay). You'll streamline data flows across teams and deliver insights for a predictable, efficient revenue engine. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Analytics in B2B SaaS, admin-level Salesforce proficiency, and ability to design reporting, forecasting, and process frameworks. You'll manage operational cadence across sales, marketing, and customer success including pipeline reviews, QBRs, and board reporting.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 5+ requirement, deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise directly aligns with stack (Gong, LeanData, Apollo are bonus), and extensive GTM/forecasting/QBR experience perfectly fits the operator mandate. Only minor gap is no explicit mention of Gong/LeanData, but core competencies are elite.
ai_opener: I noticed Embrace is building a predictable revenue engine with Salesforce, HubSpot, and modern ops tools—exactly the stack I've architected at scale across B2B SaaS. Over 15 years, I've designed forecasting frameworks, owned QBR cadences, and optimized data flows that drive operational efficiency. I'd be interested in how you're thinking about centralizing insights across sales, marketing, and CS.

title: Revenue Operations Manager (Remote - Fractional)

This fractional role requires 5+ years of hands-on Revenue Operations experience or 10+ years across Sales, Marketing, and/or Customer Success ops. Familiarity with Salesforce, Marketo, BI tools (Domo, Tableau, Looker, SQL), and the broader SaaS ecosystem is required.

The remote structure and focus on cross-functional strategy optimization are ideal for his senior-level experience.

Your approach to helping companies optimize GTM efficiency through data-driven strategies resonates with my background in Salesforce administration, analytics, and pipeline forecasting. I'd be interested in exploring how my hands-on RevOps expertise could support your clients' scaling challenges.

title: RevOps Lead

The RevOps Lead serves as the operational backbone of the GTM engine, working hands-on across Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success to ensure revenue processes, systems, and data are clean, aligned, and built to scale. title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design.
